title: Weather Chat
opening: Hi there! How's the weather looking where you are today?

t1.prompt: Hi there! How's the weather looking where you are today?
t1.promptTranslation: English: Hi there! How's the weather looking where you are today? (A common, informal way to ask about the current weather conditions).

t2_reaction.prompt: Oh, interesting! Is that typical for this time of year, or is it a bit unusual? Do you have any plans for the weekend, regardless of the weather?
t2_reaction.promptTranslation: English: Oh, interesting! Is that typical for this time of year, or is it a bit unusual? Do you have any plans for the weekend, regardless of the weather? (Using 'interesting' to acknowledge varied input, 'this time of year' is a common temporal phrase).

t3_season_chat.prompt: I see! What's your favourite season, then, and why? I'm always torn between spring and autumn myself.
t3_season_chat.promptTranslation: English: I see! What's your favourite season, then, and why? I'm always torn between spring and autumn myself. ('Torn between' is a common idiom meaning undecided).

t3_plans_chat.prompt: Sounds fun! I hope the weather turns out perfect for you then. Enjoy whatever you're doing!
t3_plans_chat.promptTranslation: English: Sounds fun! I hope the weather turns out perfect for you then. Enjoy whatever you're doing! ('Turns out perfect' is a common idiom for a desired outcome).

t3_no_plans_chat.prompt: Sometimes it's nice to just relax at home, isn't it? Especially when the weather isn't cooperating. Maybe catch up on some reading!
t3_no_plans_chat.promptTranslation: English: Sometimes it's nice to just relax at home, isn't it? Especially when the weather isn't cooperating. Maybe catch up on some reading! ('Weather isn't cooperating' is a natural expression).

t4_wrap_up.prompt: Well, it was lovely chatting about the weather with you! Have a great day!
t4_wrap_up.promptTranslation: English: Well, it was lovely chatting about the weather with you! Have a great day! ('Lovely chatting' is a polite closing phrase).

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, could you please repeat that? I didn't quite catch it.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: English: Sorry, could you please repeat that? I didn't quite catch it. (A common phrase to ask for clarification).

t-end.prompt: Alright, it was nice chatting with you! Take care!
t-end.promptTranslation: English: Alright, it was nice chatting with you! Take care! (A common, friendly goodbye).
